pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description and checked in the export script's SQL query.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic scenario requiring the agent to register new farm equipment in the Ekylibre system. The expected equipment name 'Massey Ferguson 7720' and work number 'MF-7720-01' are explicitly enforced by the export queries and verifier. The required nature/variant keywords ('tractor', 'tracteur', 'equipment', 'équipement') match the prompt instructions. The login credentials (admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678) are confirmed as the expected defaults configured in the environment setup scripts.
